title: hypericum malatyanum subsp. malatyanum
intro: Hypericum malatyanum subsp. malatyanum, also known as Turkish St. John's Wort, is a plant species belonging to the Hypericum genus. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Turkish St. John's Wort include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and skin conditions such as eczema and wounds. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support mental health and reduce inflammation.
